mapper.select: SELECT t.task_id, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.title, t.description, t.due_date, t.priority, t.status FROM todo t LEFT JOIN user_list u ON u.id = t.user_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.due_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.due_date, t.task_id

SELECT t.task_id, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.title, t.description, t.due_date, t.priority, t.status FROM todo t LEFT JOIN user_list u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.due_date IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.due_date, t.task_id
SELECT t.task_id, t.user_id, u.name AS user_name, t.title, t.description, t.due_date, t.priority, t.status FROM todo t LEFT JOIN user_list u ON u.id = t.user_id WHERE t.task_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todo (user_id, title, description, due_date, priority, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE todo SET user_id = #{userId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, due_date = #{dueDate}, priority = #{priority}, status = #{status} WHERE task_id = #{id}
